settings.title: Settings
settings.chooseSection: Choose a settings section from the list, or from the cards below.

settings.deleteUserConfirm: Delete this user? This cannot be undone.

settings.userPermissionsDesc: Per-user permission customization: grant or revoke permission even if the role stays the same.
settings.userPermissionsRoleVsUserHint: Entries marked as granted from the role come from the role definition; to block one, use "Revoked for this user". You can also grant extra permissions only for this user.
settings.adminHasAllPermissions: The Admin role has all permissions automatically and cannot be edited.
settings.notificationsEnabledDesc: Create alerts for expiry and due dates

settings.notificationSoundEnabledDesc: Play a sound when new alerts arrive
settings.desktopNotificationsEnabledDesc: Show an OS notification when new alerts arrive
settings.backupDesc: Create a backup of the database or restore from a previous backup file.

settings.restoreDesc: Replace current data with a backup file
settings.restoreConfirm: Restoring will replace all current data. Are you sure?
settings.backupToFolderDesc: Save to the app's dedicated backup folder
settings.autoBackupEnabledDesc: Create a backup automatically every 24 hours in the dedicated folder
settings.backupRestoreConfirm: Restore this backup? Current data will be replaced.
settings.userTypeLinkedDesc: Link account to an employee or employer

settings.hierarchyForbidden: You cannot perform this action on a user at the same or higher rank than yours.
settings.sessionInvalid: Session expired or invalid. Sign out and sign in again.
settings.hierarchyNoRolesToAssign: There are no roles below your rank to assign to a new user.
settings.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least 4 characters
settings.dbRemoteDesc: Enter the API (server) URL and login details to connect to the server database.
settings.dbConfigFileHint: Connection is stored in db-connection.json under the app userData folder (next to the SQLite file).
settings.dbDevApiFilled: Filled http://127.0.0.1:3001 — save and connect with your credentials
settings.dbTestThenSaveHint: To enable remote mode for logins, use «Save and connect» below.
